description.value:
A relatively new bloodline that appeared following the Gap, those of the umber bloodline possess powerful psychic abilities that seem linked with events that not even they can remember.

You gain one cantrip from the occult spell list. You can cast this cantrip as an innate occult spell at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up. Replace all instances of arcane or Arcana in all madrosarai ancestry feats you gain with occult and Occultism respectively, including the tradition of all innate spells you gain, the traits of the feats, and the feat's prerequisites.
